title: Working with Multiple Results from a Single Object
description:
Working with Multiple Results from a Single Object

Working with Multiple Results from a Single Object

Blob and Correlation objects can be used to find more that only 1 feature within a single search window

.
  The properties and results which you will need to understand for working with multi-result vision objects are listed below:

CurrentResult property

				NumberToFind property

				NumberFound result

				ShowAllResults result

The Default and Maximum # of Features a Vision Object Can Have

The Sorting Order of the Features that are Found
